title: lens esculenta var. abyssinica
intro: Lens esculenta var. abyssinica, also known as the African or Ethiopian variety of lentil, is a type of plant belonging to the family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lens esculenta var. abyssinica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage and certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Lens esculenta var. abyssinica are typically made by drying and grinding the leaves, seeds, or roots, which can be used in teas, infusions, or as a powder for various medicinal purposes.
